About.title: About Konstantin
About.lead: Riga-based camera operator working across broadcast, live music, comedy, and branded content — usually with a passport stamp in the bag.
About.body1: Konstantin picked up the craft on cramped student TV sets, then moved into concerts, multicam stages, and handheld documentary work. He is used to tight schedules, changing light, and directors who rewrite the shot list at lunch.
About.body2: Recent seasons have mixed ENG-style field work with slower studio days: long lenses for music, wider glass for rooms that feel small, and plenty of time spent matching exposure between LED walls and tungsten practicals.
About.body3: Based in Latvia, comfortable across the Baltics and Poland — Warsaw, Vilnius, Tallinn, and Jūrmala are all regular pins on the map. English, Latvian, and Russian on set; coffee preference is negotiable.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: The fastest way to reach me is through social channels — we can align on timing and details there.
